name: Jupyter

enable_K8s_Cluster_For_Pyspark_Workers.description: Enable PySpark to use Kubernetes worker nodes

k8s_api_server_url.description: URL of the Kubernetes API server

spark_K8s_Container_Image.description: Container image used for Spark Kubernetes worker pods

postStartCommand: bash -lc 'set -e; LOG=/tmp/jupyter.log; if ! ss -ltn 2> /dev/null | grep -q ":8888"; then nohup /usr/local/bin/start-jupyter.sh > "$LOG" 2>&1 & fi; for i in {1..30}; do if ss -ltn 2> /dev/null | grep -q ":8888"; then echo "Jupyter Lab is listening on 8888"; exit 0; fi; sleep 1; done'
